channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Lindsey Vonn's coach suggests she'll be competitive in her return to World Cup skiing at age 40
item.description: ST. MORITZ, Switzerland (AP) — How fast can she go on her titanium knee? And how competitive will she be? Those are the big questions surrounding Lindsey Vonn’s comeback to World Cup ski racing this weekend at age 40 after nearly six years of retirement.
item.dc:creator: ANDREW DAMPF, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: FIFA signs Netflix to US broadcast deal for the Women's World Cup in 2027 and 2031
item.description: FIFA has signed Netflix to a United States broadcast deal for the Women's World Cup in 2027 plus the 2031 edition that could be played in the U.S. The deal announced Friday is the most significant FIFA has signed with a streaming service for a major tournament.
item.dc:creator: GRAHAM DUNBAR, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Justin Herbert passes for 2 touchdowns, Chargers score on free kick and rally past Broncos 34-27
item.description: INGLEWOOD, Calif. (AP) — Trailing 21-13 at halftime Thursday night against the Denver Broncos, some wondered if the Los Angeles Chargers had any resolve left after going through their worst four-quarter stretch of the season.
item.dc:creator: JOE REEDY, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Penn State rallies from 2-set deficit to beat Nebraska in NCAA volleyball, faces Louisville in Final
item.description: LOUISVILLE, Ky. (AP) — Jess Mruzik had 26 kills, Caroline Jurevicius had 20 and Penn State rallied from an 0-2 semifinal deficit for a five-set victory over Nebraska early Friday to reach the NCAA championship. Penn State will face host Louisville, which eliminated No.
item.dc:creator: GARY B. GRAVES, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Longtime Detroit sports broadcaster announces he’ll retire after decades on TV
item.description: A longtime Detroit sports broadcaster announced that he’s going to retire after decades on television.
item.dc:creator: Derick Hutchinson, Local 4

item.title: Sharks’ third-period woes reach record proportions with Oilers, McDavid on deck
item.description: Can the skidding San Jose Sharks take some positives into Saturday's game against Connor McDavid and the Edmonton Oilers?
item.dc:creator: Curtis Pashelka, The Mercury News

item.title: Towns relishes an enjoyable return to Minnesota, from the roar of the crowd to a blowout win
item.description: MINNEAPOLIS (AP) — Karl-Anthony Towns took some time to reflect on nine formative NBA seasons in Minnesota, arriving to the arena early for the morning shootaround before the rest of the New York Knicks.
item.dc:creator: DAVE CAMPBELL, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Taking advantage of an obscure rule, Chargers' Dicker makes NFL's first fair-catch kick in 48 years
item.description: INGLEWOOD, Calif. (AP) — Of all the rules in football, Jim Harbaugh considers the obscure fair-catch kick to be his favorite. The Los Angeles Chargers coach had the opportunity to try one Thursday night for only the second time in his career.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Winter Classic Day 2: Palisade boys show off versatility in big win over Moffat County
item.description: On day two of the annual Winter Classic presented by Family Health West, the Palisade Bulldogs took center stage on their home court.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: Jazz show some fight in 126-119 win over Detroit
item.description: DETROIT (ABC4 Sports) - Collin Sexton scored 30 points, Lauri Markkanen had 27 points and 14 rebounds and the Utah Jazz beat the Detroit Pistons 126-119 on Thursday night for for their second victory in 10 games. Keyonte George added 28 points for Utah.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Sammy Sosa admits to making 'mistakes' amid steroid speculation, apologizes to estranged Cubs
item.description: A long feud between Sammy Sosa and his former Chicago Cubs is finally over after the former slugger admitted to making "mistakes" amid speculation he took steroids.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Ducks to honor fellow O.C. team at promotional night
item.description: If you're a fan of Orange County sports, you're in luck this January. On Jan. 7, the Anaheim Ducks are hosting Angels Night, an event that includes a baseball jersey giveaway for the first 5,000 fans in attendance. The game against the Calgary Flames begins at 7 p.m. Tickets begin at less than $30.
item.dc:creator: Cameron Kiszla, KTLA 5

item.title: AP Exclusive: Pro tennis player Jenson Brooksby talks about living with autism
item.description: ORLANDO, Fla. (AP) — Jenson Brooksby tugged at the right shoulder of his red T-shirt and fiddled with some strands of his dirty blond hair as he spoke to The Associated Press about what he'd like the world — the tennis world, yes, but also everyone else — to know about him.
item.dc:creator: HOWARD FENDRICH, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: IOC publishes manifestos of 7 candidates running to be president and lead Olympics
item.description: GENEVA (AP) — The seven candidates running for International Olympic Committee president had their manifestos published on Thursday, and one is offering to take just half of the eight-year mandate on offer and stand again in 2029.
item.dc:creator: GRAHAM DUNBAR, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: College hockey player sued by opponent over injury she suffered on the ice
item.description: The lawsuit claims an illegal hit from Crawford during a game on Feb. 19, 2023, has caused her serious long-term issues.
item.dc:creator: Matt Jaworowski, NewsNation

item.title: NCAA president says there are 'less than 10' transgender athletes in college sports
item.description: NCAA President Charlie Baker told a Senate panel that there are fewer than 10 transgender athletes he is aware of who currently compete in college sports, pouring cold water on an issue Republicans have said is a nationwide problem and one that is increasingly fraught territory for Democrats.
item.dc:creator: Brooke Migdon, WGN 9

item.title: Gimmicks, not football, dominating college bowl season
item.description: College bowl games are becoming less about football and more about marketing in an ever-changing sports landscape
item.dc:creator: Ryan Bass, NewsNation

item.title: Guentzel scores in 7 consecutive games, 1 shy of matching the franchise record in Tuesday's win against Blue Jackets
item.description: TAMPA, Fla. (AP) — Nick Paul had a goal and two assists to lead the Tampa Bay Lightning to a 5-3 victory over the Columbus Blue Jackets. Jake Guentzel, Luke Glendening, Brayden Point and Mitchell Chaffee also scored for Tampa Bay, which has won five of six. Andrei Vasilevskiy finished with 28 saves.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Aggies lose first game of the season to UCSD, 75-73
item.description: LOGAN, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - Off to its best start in school history, the Utah State basketball team dropped its first game of the year after ten straight victories, losing at home to UC San Diego Tuesday night, 75-73.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: This is when you'll be able to start watching San Diego FC live
item.description: San Diego FC on Tuesday released its full preseason schedule for the 2025 Major League Soccer season.
item.dc:creator: Domenick Candelieri, Fox 5

item.title: Report: Cubs trade Cody Bellinger to New York Yankees
item.description: The Chicago Cubs have traded Cody Bellinger and cash to the New York Yankees in exchange for Cody Poteet, after Bellinger won a Silver Slugger award with the North Siders in 2023.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: LAFC, LA Galaxy to join 18 other pro soccer teams for preseason event in Southern California
item.description: Both of L.A.’s professional men’s soccer clubs will join 18 other teams – including six women’s teams – for the 2025 Coachella Valley Invitational. Preseason matches at the Empire Polo Club in Indio begin on Feb.
item.dc:creator: Will Conybeare, KTLA 5

item.title: Bears at Vikings preview: Injury updates, a look into recent matchups, and more
item.description: MINNEAPOLIS, Minn. (WGN) — The Chicago Bears travel to Minneapolis for Monday Night Football to face a surging Minnesota Vikings team that's won six straight and has a chance to tie the Detroit Lions for the NFC North lead in front of a national audience.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Broncos def. Colts 31-13
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX)— Playoff pressure makes diamonds, and the Denver Broncos proved they can shine when it counts, delivering a dominant second-half performance to defeat the Indianapolis Colts 31-13 on Sunday. The game started with postseason hopes hanging in the balance for the Broncos.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: Colorado two-way star Travis Hunter wins Heisman Trophy as college football's top player
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Travis Hunter turned every play into prime time — on both sides of the ball — and ultimately took home the Heisman Trophy. Now he’s got a leg up on his celebrity coach at Colorado.
item.dc:creator: MIKE FITZPATRICK, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Jazz come up short in shootout with Phoenix, 134-126
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - In an incredible display of shooting by both teams, the Utah Jazz could not keep up with the Phoenix Suns in a 134-126 loss Friday night at the Delta Center. Both teams made 22 three-pointers and shot well over 50 percent from the field.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4
